name: ExclusionListDelete_EE

text.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT '@{pipeline().parameters.Subject}' AS TaskSubject) DELETE FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.W_TASK_EXCL WHERE TASK_SUBJ_NM = (SELECT TaskSubject FROM cte) AND (SELECT TaskSubject FROM cte) IS NOT NULL

Description:
COPYRIGHT 2005 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 


JOB NAME:    ExclusionListExtr


DESCRIPTION:   Extract the records for a subject from the DB2 - W_TASK_EXCL table.
      

INPUTS:	 Subject name

  
HASH FILES:  TASK_EXCL


TRANSFORMS:  None
                        
   
PROCESSING:   Task rows from DB2 table are concatenated together with a semi-colon delimiter.  Each row overwrites the previous row in the TASK_EXCL UV table.  The last entry is the combination of all DB2 entries.
 

OUTPUTS:  A semi-colon delimited string of tasks to exclude for a subject.
                    

===============================================


MODIFICATIONS:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
DEVELOPER                         DATE                 PROJECT                                                  DESCRIPTION                                                       DATASTAGE   ENVIRONMENT                     CODE  REVIEW            REVIEW DATE

Nagesh Bandi                         07/01/2013        5114-Enterprise Efficiencies                 Extract subject records from W_TASK_EXCL              EnterpriseWrhseDevl                                      Jag Yelavarthi              2013-08-16

Annotations:
Delete records from W_TASK_EXCL table for that particular Subject.

Delete TASK_EXCL.dat file created by EXCLUSIONLISTExtr job using After-job subroutine.

Job Name:
EXCLUSIONLISTDelete
Generate a dummy row.
Delete information related tto that particular Subject from TASK_EXCL table
Pass Parameter
